title: Touch Grass
description: A Datapack that makes it where you have to touch grass
body:
# About
This Datapack is designed to make your life hard by making it where you have to touch grass or other green stuff to live


<details>
<summary>Blocks you can walk on</summary>

# BLocks You can step on (work in progress update)
